entities.name: Quality Metrics
entities.context: Framework for tracking session effectiveness with specific targets

entities.name: Insights
entities.context: Metric category tracked per session, target 5-7

entities.name: Assumptions
entities.context: Metric for surfacing underlying assumptions, target 10-15

entities.name: Blind spots
entities.context: Metric for identifying overlooked areas, target 3-5

entities.name: Perspective shifts
entities.context: Metric for tracking viewpoint changes, target 2-3

entities.name: Confidence level
entities.context: Metric tracked per insight for certainty assessment

entities.name: Style effectiveness
entities.context: Learning outcome from tracking quality metrics

entities.name: Session depth
entities.context: Visibility outcome from tracking quality metrics

relationships.context: Insights is a tracked component of Quality Metrics
Assumptions surfaced is a tracked component
